engine.ladder_reasoning: A performing band is judged by its work — the promo video, band photos (~54 images), line-up, and repertoire ARE the proof; there's no defined expertise being sold nor a physical place to visit.

goal.one_action: get fans/organizers to engage — see tour dates & attend, subscribe to the newsletter, submit song-request votes, or contact for booking

structure.archetype_note: Band/entertainer site with multiple parallel jobs (fan engagement + tour schedule + organizer resources); not a single-conversion funnel — hence in_icp:false.

mapped.observed_as: 1st-Class Country- und Linedanceband aus dem Rhein-Main-Gebiet!
Programm (no requests; setlist published ~7 days before event)
direct contact block (Elke und Dirk, phone, email)

unmapped.observed: Votings table linking two external Tally.so song-request/poll forms + past voting-result pages
unmapped.why_no_fit: Fan-voting/poll engagement is neither a lead form nor social proof — no canonical section for recurring fan polls

unmapped.observed: Tour 2026 date table (~16 rows, city/venue/ticket-contact/time, past rows struck through)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A dated schedule of shows is not results/testimonials/pricing — no canonical events/schedule section

unmapped.observed: Veranstalter page: Pressebild + Logo + Technical Rider + stage-plan Download buttons
unmapped.why_no_fit: Downloadable EPK/press-kit assets for event organizers have no canonical section

unmapped.observed: Tänze/Songs large repertoire table (song title / original artist, dozens of rows)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A setlist/repertoire catalogue is not a feature list or pricing — no canonical section
sectionList has no gallery id; the gallery is the visual proof of a performer

unmapped.observed: inline embedded PDF (event flyer) via iframe
unmapped.why_no_fit: Ad-hoc embedded document, no canonical fit

proposed_new.name: event-listings
proposed_new.evidence: 'Tour 2026' dated table of shows with per-date city/venue and ticket-order contact — matches canonical event-listings (dated schedule of shows).

proposed_new.name: press-kit-downloads
proposed_new.evidence: Dedicated 'Veranstalter' page offering downloadable press photo, logo, technical rider and stage-plan PDFs for event organizers — an EPK asset pack, distinct from gallery/catalog.

proposed_new.name: fan-voting
proposed_new.evidence: 'Votings' table routing to external Tally.so song-request/poll forms plus published 'Ergebnisse der Votings' result pages — recurring audience-voting engagement, not list capture or a lead form.

confidence.why: fetch_quality=full, static HTML fully captured across all 6 pages incl. forms, CTAs, embeds and oddities.

gap_findings: Not one conversion action — band site juggles newsletter subscribe, fan voting, tour schedule, contact, and organizer press kit in parallel; the 5-engine/single-goal model cannot represent this multi-job entertainer archetype.
event-listings (tour dates) is a canonical CAPABILITY but has no canonical SECTION id — dated show schedules keep landing in miscellaneous.
No canonical section for a performer's repertoire/setlist catalogue.
sectionList lacks a 'gallery' id despite gallery/portfolio being a core capability — visual proof sections fall through.
Newsletter subscribe + fan-voting via external Tally are distinct from lead-form/external-list-signup (voting/results, not email list capture).
